title: Vera Bradley - The Motley Fool Stock Analysis
text: Vera Bradley Inc. (NASDAQ: VRA) is tracked by Motley Fool for investors seeking information on the luggage and bags manufacturer. The company designs and markets handbags, luggage, travel accessories, and fashion items. Historical earnings results show volatility with significant earnings swings quarter-to-quarter. The company's turnaround efforts under Project Restoration focus on stabilizing the direct-to-consumer segment, improving wholesale relationships, and optimizing the outlet channel.
